title: Offlimits
description: Increase the max build limit in 1.16.5!
body:
[![](https://img.shields.io/discord/648382392230215702?color=208fc6&label=%20&labelColor=1b74b6&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord)](https://discord.com/invite/fTzK9SP) [![](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=ItsBlackGear&color=208fc6&labelColor=1b74b6&style=for-the-badge&logo=x&logoColor=DDE4EF)](https://twitter.com/ItsBlackGear) [![](https://img.shields.io/endpoint?label=&color=208fc6&labelColor=1b74b6&style=for-the-badge&logo=Patreon&logoColor=white&url=https://shieldsio-patreon.vercel.app/api/?username=blackgear&type=patrons)](https://patreon.com/blackgear)
![](https://i.imgur.com/6H8YGoX.png)
###

Requires Platform API

[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires_Platform-white?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=1b74b6&color=208fc6)](https://modrinth.com/mod/platform)
![](https://i.imgur.com/6H8YGoX.png)
🚀 **Offlimits** is a **highly experimental** mod, designed to extend the max build height in 1.16.5. **Features:** - Increases the max build height to 320 blocks. - Integrates a configuration to modify the max build height, ranging from 256 to 512. - Integrates the new terrain generation from 1.17+ (Noise Caves, Noodle Caves and Aquifers). **Upcoming Features:** - Increase the min build height to -64 blocks (configurable). - Extend the min terrain generation height to -64 and below if possible. **IMPORTANT INFORMATION** It **IS** possible to upgrade the max build height of your existing worlds without any issues, however some things should be considered: - This mod is **highly experimental**, so it is highly recommended to keep a **BACKUP** of your world!. - Higher build height or depth may affect the performance of your game, so try under your own risk. - It has been tested with various mods, but there may be some that could cause some incompatibilities, here be dragons. **KNOWN INCOMPATIBILITIES** - Immersive Portals - Phosphor / Radon - Roadrunner / Lithium
![](https://i.imgur.com/6H8YGoX.png)
[![](https://i.imgur.com/H8ftf1K.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/minecraft-servers)
